# PropProfessor MCP

A Model Context Protocol server that gives AI agents access to sharp sports betting signal — live odds across 36 sportsbooks, consensus edge detection, sharp money movement tracking, and player injury research.

## Quick start
- Install: `npm install -g propprofessor-mcp`
- Auth: `node scripts/pp-login.js` (one-time browser login)
- Wire: add to your MCP client config
- Verify: `npm run install:verify` (53 tests, no credentials needed, <1s)

## Key tools for agents
- `today()` — one-call: sharp slate + your pending picks + recent stats
- `ask({ query })` — natural language router (e.g. "best WNBA plays tonight")
- `quick_screen({ book, leagues })` — scan all leagues × markets with sharp consensus
- `validate_play({ league, gameId, playId, market })` — BET/CONSIDER/PASS verdict
- `place_bet({ league, gameId, playId, selection, market, book, stake })` — validate + log
- `resolve_pick({ id, result })` — settle after game ends
- `get_started({ user_type })` — concise agent prompt for casual/intermediate/sharp

## Critical pitfalls
- Always pass `playId` to `validate_play` — bare selection strings can fail with lookup_failed
- Market names vary by league (e.g. WNBA "Total Points", Soccer "Draw No Bet")
- First `quick_screen` call is slow (multi-league fan-out) — repeat calls hit cache
- tier/kaiCall/edge/screenScore are signal-quality ratings, NOT win-probability predictions
- Use `get_market_registry({ sport })` to discover correct market names for your league+book combo

## More info
- README: https://github.com/j17drake/propprofessor-mcp#readme
- Agent guide: docs/agent-guide.md
- Backtesting: docs/BACKTESTING.md
